name: closet
hints: A dusty closet with a small vial. Both items here might be useful.
GET VIAL - it contains something important. The dust has been here for centuries.
GET VIAL (contains blood or holy water). GET DUST if needed. WEST returns to the workroom (room 21).
GET VIAL (essential item - may contain holy water for vampire defense). GET DUST. WEST to workroom (room 21). The closet is accessed from the workroom.
notes: Small closet off the workroom containing a small vial (essential item, may contain holy water) and centuries of accumulated dust. WEST returns to the workroom (room 21). Both items can be collected.
